q: A train leaves at 2:15 PM traveling 60 mph. A second train leaves the same station at 3:00 PM on the same track traveling 80 mph in the same direction. How many minutes after 3:00 PM does the second train catch the first?
A book has 250 pages. Maria reads 12 pages on day 1 and increases by 3 pages each subsequent day (15 on day 2, 18 on day 3, and so on). On which day number does she finish the book?
A shop sells pens at 3 for $2 and pencils at 5 for $1. Tom buys 12 pens and 20 pencils and pays with a $20 bill. How many dollars change does he get?
In a class of 40 students, 25 play football, 18 play cricket, and 7 play neither. How many play both football and cricket?
A tank fills through pipe A in 6 hours and drains through pipe B in 9 hours. If both are open starting from empty, how many hours does it take to fill?
A number divided by 7 leaves remainder 3, and divided by 5 leaves remainder 2. What is the smallest positive such number?
A rectangle has perimeter 44 and area 120. What is the length of its longer side?
Sarah is 3 times as old as her son now. In 12 years she will be twice as old as him. How old is Sarah now?
A cyclist covers a route at 15 km/h and returns along the same route at 10 km/h. What is the average speed for the whole trip in km/h?
How many positive integers less than 100 are divisible by 3 or 5 but not by both?
A jar has red and blue marbles in ratio 3:5. After adding 16 red marbles the ratio becomes 1:1. How many blue marbles are in the jar?
A worker is paid $15/hour for the first 40 hours in a week and 1.5x that rate beyond 40 hours. In a week she earned $712.50. How many hours did she work?
A shop marks up an $80 item by 25 percent, then discounts the marked price by 20 percent. What is the final price in dollars?
Three identical machines together produce 120 widgets in 4 hours. How many hours would 2 of those machines need to produce 120 widgets?
One number is 3 more than twice another. Their sum is 36. What is the larger number?
How many diagonals does a regular 12-sided polygon have?
A car travels 240 km using 16 liters of fuel. How many liters are needed for 375 km at the same rate?
Two fair dice are rolled. Of the 36 equally likely outcomes, how many give a sum of 8 or more?
A tank holds 600 liters. Pipe A fills at 20 L/min and pipe B at 30 L/min. Pipe A runs alone for 10 minutes, then both run together. What is the total number of minutes to fill the tank?
What is the sum of all positive integers less than 50 that are divisible by 7?
A rope is cut into two pieces, one exactly 3 times the other. The longer piece is 18 meters longer than the shorter. What is the total length in meters?
In 6 years, Ali will be twice as old as he was 4 years ago. How old is Ali now?
A rectangular garden measures 20 m by 15 m. A path 2 m wide runs around the outside of the garden. What is the area of the path in square meters?
A basket has apples and oranges in the ratio 5:3. After 12 more oranges are added, the ratio becomes 5:6. How many apples are in the basket?
